title: Avoid empty multi-line comments
description: Empty multi-line comments serve no purpose and can confuse developers about whether they represent unfinished documentation, forgotten content, or accidental code artifacts. They should be removed to keep code clean.
recommendation: Remove empty multi-line comments or add meaningful content if documentation is intended.

noncompliant.description: Empty multi-line comments serve no purpose and clutter the code.

compliant.description: Add meaningful content to comments or remove them entirely if they serve no purpose.

checks.message: Empty multi-line comment detected: Remove empty comment block or add meaningful content. If documentation is intended, provide actual content.
